description: Implement adapter extension policy — checklist docs, operational rules, AGENTS.md references, config cleanup, resource limits, shared base image

userStories.title: Create adapter checklist document
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a step-by-step guide for adding new adapters so that I can extend the system without reading all the code.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/adapter-checklist.md created
Section 1: Stream adapter checklist (files to create, interface to conform to, docker-compose entry, testing steps)
Section 2: H/W adapter checklist (Case A: MQTT-native device, Case B: new signal type, Case C: protocol adapter)
References services/streaming/AGENTS.md for RTMP Input Specification
References services/hw-gateway/AGENTS.md for MQTT Input Specification
References services/cctv-adapter/AGENTS.md as reference implementation
Includes example Dockerfile, go.mod, main.go skeleton
Includes docker-compose.yml entry template
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create operational rules document
userStories.description: As an operator, I need documented rules for naming, config, monitoring, and resource management so that the system stays consistent as it grows.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/operational-rules.md created
Container naming convention: sentinel-{source-type}-adapter pattern with examples
Config management rules: JSON files in /config/, hot reload endpoint, env var conventions
Monitoring rules: required /healthz endpoint, docker healthcheck template, stream health from streaming server only
Resource limit guidelines: passthrough vs re-encoding CPU budgets
Scaling rule: one adapter per source type, split at 20+ FFmpeg processes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update AGENTS.md files with policy references
userStories.description: As a developer, I need AGENTS.md files to point to the new policy docs so that the information is discoverable.
acceptanceCriteria: Root AGENTS.md references docs/adapter-checklist.md and docs/operational-rules.md
services/streaming/AGENTS.md references adapter checklist for how to add a new adapter
services/cctv-adapter/AGENTS.md notes it is the reference implementation and points to checklist
services/hw-gateway/AGENTS.md references adapter checklist for H/W extension cases
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Clean up dummy RTSP cameras from config
userStories.description: As a developer, I need cameras.json to only contain real/working entries so that cctv-adapter doesn't try to connect to non-existent cameras.
acceptanceCriteria: config/cameras.json contains empty array [] or is removed
cctv-adapter starts cleanly with no cameras (no error logs about failed RTSP connections)
Existing yt-cam-1 and yt-cam-2 still work (they are YouTube adapter, not cctv-adapter)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add resource limits to adapter containers in docker-compose.yml
userStories.description: As an operator, I need resource limits on FFmpeg-running adapters so that they don't consume all CPU/memory on the mini PC.
acceptanceCriteria: youtube-adapter: CPU limit 2.0, memory limit 512M (re-encodes with libx264)
cctv-adapter: CPU limit 1.0, memory limit 256M (passthrough, minimal CPU)
Other services (web-backend, notifier, hw-gateway): memory limit 128M
streaming: memory limit 256M
Limits set via deploy.resources.limits in docker-compose.yml
All services still start and run with limits applied
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create shared FFmpeg base image Dockerfile
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a shared base image with FFmpeg pre-installed so that new adapters don't repeat the same apk install step.
acceptanceCriteria: docker/ffmpeg-base.Dockerfile created
Based on alpine:3.19 with ffmpeg pre-installed
Build instructions in a comment at top of file
youtube-adapter and cctv-adapter Dockerfiles updated to reference this base or documented how to use it
docker compose build succeeds
Typecheck passes
